mapper.select: SELECT * FROM binding WHERE guardian_id = #{guardianId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM binding WHERE elderly_id = #{elderlyId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM binding WHERE guardian_id = #{guardianId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM binding WHERE elderly_id = #{elderlyId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM binding WHERE guardian_id = #{guardianId} AND elderly_id = #{elderlyId} AND deleted = 0
